KERNEL32.dll: Core Windows API — file I/O, memory management, process and thread creation.
USER32.dll: Windows UI API — windows, messages, input handling, and display functions.
ADVAPI32.dll: Advanced Windows APIs — registry, security, services, and encryption.
NTDLL.dll: Low-level NT kernel interface — direct system calls, often used to bypass security.
SHELL32.dll: Windows Shell API — file operations, shortcuts, and shell integration.
WS2_32.dll: Windows Sockets — all TCP/IP and UDP network communication.
WININET.dll: High-level internet API — HTTP, FTP, and cookie handling.
CRYPT32.dll: Windows cryptography — certificate handling and data encryption.
PSAPI.dll: Process Status API — enumerating running processes and modules.
SHLWAPI.dll: Shell lightweight utility — string, path, and registry helpers.
GDI32.dll: Graphics Device Interface — drawing, fonts, and display output.
MSVCRT.dll: Microsoft C runtime — standard C library functions.
COMCTL32.dll: Common controls — buttons, list views, tree views, and toolbars.
COMDLG32.dll: Common dialogs — open file, save file, print, and colour picker.
OLE32.dll: Object Linking and Embedding — COM infrastructure and clipboard.
OLEAUT32.dll: OLE automation — type libraries and ActiveX scripting support.
NETAPI32.dll: Network Management API — domain, share, and user account operations.
IPHLPAPI.dll: IP Helper API — network adapter info, routing tables, ARP cache.
DBGHELP.dll: Debugging helpers — symbol loading, stack walking, and crash dumps.
WINTRUST.dll: Windows trust verification — Authenticode signature validation.
IMAGEHLP.dll: Image help — PE file manipulation and checksum utilities.
SETUPAPI.dll: Setup API — device installation and INF file processing.
WINSPOOL.DRV: Print spooler — printer management and print job submission.
MPR.dll: Multiple Provider Router — network provider and credential management.
URLMON.dll: URL moniker — downloading files and zone security checks.
WINHTTP.dll: WinHTTP — lower-level HTTP client for services and background tasks.
DNSAPI.dll: DNS API — name resolution and DNS record queries.
SECUR32.dll: Security support — authentication packages and SSO functions.
BCRYPT.dll: Cryptography Next Generation (CNG) — modern encryption primitives.
NCRYPT.dll: CNG key storage — asymmetric key management and certificates.
USERENV.dll: User environment — profile loading, group policy, and env variables.
VERSION.dll: Version information — reading PE version resources.
MSWSOCK.dll: Microsoft WinSock extension — TransmitFile and AcceptEx.
RASAPI32.dll: Remote Access Service — dial-up and VPN connection management.
WLDAP32.dll: LDAP — Active Directory and directory service queries.
MSVCP140.dll: Visual C++ 2015-2022 C++ runtime — STL and exception handling.
UCRTBASE.dll: Universal C runtime — standard C library for modern Windows.
MSCOREE.dll: .NET CLR host — initialises and runs managed .NET code.
KERNELBASE.dll: Modern kernel base — lower-level implementations of KERNEL32 functions.
